objectives.text: Mayor, can you believe it? Twenty-five citizens now call this place home! What started as a humble camp in the wilderness has grown into a proper outpost. People are talking about us in the surrounding lands!

options.answer: We have come a long way!

result.text: Indeed we have! With twenty-five souls working together, we are no longer just surviving. We are thriving! The citizens wanted me to present you with this gift as a token of their gratitude for your leadership.

options.answer: I am honored! Onward and upward!

result.text: That is the spirit! The citizens are proud to live here and they know the best is yet to come. Here, they pooled together some emeralds as a thank you!

objectives.text: Keep growing this colony, Mayor. I have a feeling we are destined for greatness!
